programmes.show_description: Drama series. Back in Wentworth, Franky discovers who framed her. Doreen learns that Liz is to give evidence against Sonia. Vera acts to undermine Ferguson.

At Unity in Brean Sands a busy check-in day tests receptionist Sara. Queues build and a lorry crashes into the automatic barriers. Can the team avoid failing at the first hurdle?
In the final challenge, Paul and James Spiridion compete to win a mystery lot. Who will get their hands on a one arm bandit or a sailor's wool work? And who will be champion of the gavel? (Ep45)

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: Bloody fighting erupts in the Gilbert Islands, a tiny Pacific archipelago, in November 1943.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: Allied armies encounter German resistance in the Italian fishing town of Anzio.
Witness how Adolf Hitler, Heinrich Himmler, Herman Goring, Josef Goebbels and Rudolf Hess made their individual journeys through pre-war Germany.
Hitler inspired loyalty from his men; Goebbels, a master of propaganda; Himmler, architect of terror; and Goring, a military man who balanced tradition with modern ambition and luxury.
Examining the disintegration of Hitler's vision of terror and the outcomes of the horrors of the period, plus European and US reflection on not acting faster to prevent the atrocities.
